text:
Hello,

  according to the Nvidia drivers webpage, a new version has been released
recently [1], [2]. According to their webpage, a (little) number of fixes
has been applied. With a bit of luck these will be related to those that
danfe metionend.

Regards.

[1] 32bit - http://www.nvidia.com/object/freebsd-x86-260.19.21-driver.html
[2] 64bit - http://www.nvidia.com/object/freebsd-x64-260.19.21-driver.html
--
